title: extra sus sand
description: Additions for the sus sand resource pack to support mods
body:
This adds Sus textures to modded Sus Blocks making the more clearly visible.

*The vanilla suspicous blocks are not changed by this you need another resource pack for that!*

The following mods are currently supported:

* [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology)
* [Even Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/even-better-archeology)

If you want support for other mods please open an issue on github.
